name: 高令宁房间
description: 温馨的居室，床榻宽大舒适，床边设小几放脉枕、药箱。窗边摆放针线筐，内有虎头帽等婴儿用品。房间布置以舒适实用为主，色调柔和。墙上挂平安符，角落放香炉。
visual_reference: Ming Dynasty pregnant woman's chamber, comfortable large bed, medical supplies nearby, embroidery basket with baby items, soft color palette, peaceful atmosphere, natural window light, traditional Chinese interior, nurturing space
lighting: 柔和自然光从窗外洒入，营造温暖安宁氛围
emotional_range: 怀孕诊断的不可置信与冷淡
